message: ci(manifest): install uv for fast cached runs

files.patch:
@@ -10,6 +10,13 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - name: Set up uv with caching
+        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v7
+        with:
+          python-version: "3.13"
+          enable-cache: true
+          cache-dependency-glob: |
+            uv.lock
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: |
           sudo apt-get update
